name: EchoPark Automotive Grand Prix
comments: Christopher Bell won the EchoPark Automotive Grand Prix at Circuit of the Americas, his 11th NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the green flag to start the race, the following car dropped to the rear for the reason indicated: No. 38 (unapproved adjustments).
